title: ML Engineer Intern
description: Join our AI team to build predictive models for credit risk and market volatility. Work with large financial datasets and deploy models in production.

title: Deep Learning Research Intern
description: Research internship focused on graph neural networks for knowledge representation. You will contribute to publications and prototype novel architectures.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Work on large language model fine-tuning and evaluation. Requires solid experience with Hugging Face ecosystem and distributed training.

title: Quantitative Analyst
description: Design and implement quantitative models for derivatives pricing and risk management. Requires 5+ years experience in quantitative finance.

title: AI Research Engineer Intern
description: Apply ML and optimization methods to aerospace structural design and predictive maintenance systems.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop and maintain backend microservices for a high-traffic e-commerce platform. No ML involved.
